hooks.command:
jq -r 'def is_code_search: ((.tool_input.glob // "") | test("\*\.(rs|py|ts|tsx|js|jsx|go|java|c|cpp|cs|rb|swift|kt|scala|php|zig)($|\})")) or ((.tool_input.pattern // "") | test("fn |struct |class |def |impl |trait |enum |interface |type |pub |async |export ")); if is_code_search then {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"DOGFOODING REMINDER: You used Grep for code exploration. Use the codixing CLI instead:
  codixing search "<query>"      — semantic code search
  codixing symbols <filter>       — find symbol definitions
  codixing usages <symbol>        — find call sites and imports
  codixing callers <file>         — who imports this file
  codixing callees <file>         — what this file imports
Run from the repo root via Bash. This dogfoods our own tool and tests search quality."}} | tojson else empty end'
